title: Frontend updates for 3-role registration, coordinator verification gating, and faculty approvals UI

requirements.summary: Update registration UI to support Student, Student Coordinator, and Faculty roles with clear coordinator-approval explanation.
acceptanceCriteria: RegistrationGate role dropdown includes Student, Student Coordinator, and Faculty.
RegistrationGate shows clear English helper text indicating Student Coordinators must be approved by Faculty before gaining booking permissions.
Registration submission sends the selected role using the updated backend ProfileRole type.

file_operations.description: Add Student to the role Select options and update helper/note copy to clearly explain that Student Coordinators require faculty approval before they can book/cancel venues; ensure submission continues to pass the selected ProfileRole value.

requirements.summary: Update frontend permission gating so booking/cancellation UI is only available for Faculty and verified Student Coordinators.
acceptanceCriteria: The read-only hook (currently checking ProfileRole.studentCoordinator) is updated to compute read-only based on (role + coordinator verification status).
BookingPage shows BookingForm only when the user has booking permissions; otherwise it shows an English read-only/needs-approval notice.
Upcoming Events detail actions and bulk cancellation UI are disabled/hidden when the user does not have booking permissions (Students and unverified Student Coordinators).

file_operations.description: Update the hook to determine read-only status based on ProfileRole plus coordinator verificationStatus (Students always read-only; Student Coordinators read-only until verified; Faculty not read-only) and expose enough state for UI to show an English 'needs approval' vs 'read-only' notice.

Use the updated read-only/permission result to render BookingForm only when booking permissions are granted; otherwise show an English notice tailored for Students vs pending/unverified Student Coordinators.

Replace the existing StudentCoordinator-only gating with permission-based gating so selection checkboxes, 'Select All', and bulk cancellation toolbar are hidden/disabled for Students and unverified/pending Student Coordinators.

Update the 'canCancel' logic to align with booking permissions (Faculty and verified Student Coordinators only); hide/disable cancel UI for Students and unverified/pending Student Coordinators and ensure any messaging remains English.

requirements.summary: Add a Faculty-only dashboard/tab to list and approve/reject pending Student Coordinator verification requests.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tab (e.g., "Approvals") appears only for Faculty users.
The Approvals view lists pending Student Coordinator verification requests with enough info to identify the user (principal/email/contact).
Faculty can approve or reject a request from the UI, with loading, success, and error states.
After approving/rejecting, the pending list refreshes and reflects the update.

file_operations.description: Create a new Faculty-only Approvals dashboard that fetches pending verification requests and renders them in a clear list/table using shadcn-ui components (e.g., Card, Button, Alert, Badge, Separator). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the new Approvals tab into the existing Tabs UI and render it only when the caller's profile role is Faculty (hide the tab for Students and Student Coordinators).

requirements.summary: Show Student Coordinator verification status in Profile dashboard and keep it accurate after faculty actions.
acceptanceCriteria: ProfileDashboard shows the user role as before and additionally shows verification status when the role is Student Coordinator.
When a coordinator becomes verified, the UI updates after refresh/reload (or query invalidation) to show verified status.

file_operations.description: Add Student to role labeling, and when role is Student Coordinator display an English verification status label (e.g., Pending faculty approval / Verified / Unverified) based on profile.verificationStatus.

requirements.summary: Update frontend type usage and add React Query hooks for coordinator verification requests while keeping existing hooks working.
acceptanceCriteria: The generated frontend backend bindings compile with the updated ProfileRole and any new verification-related types.
New React Query hook(s) are added for: (1) fetching pending verification requests, (2) approving, (3) rejecting.
Existing hooks (useCallerUserProfile, useRegisterProfile, booking hooks) continue to compile and function, with minimal required updates to pass/parse new fields.

file_operations.description: Add a React Query hook that calls the backend capability to fetch pending Student Coordinator verification requests, with appropriate loading/error handling and caching keys.
Add a React Query mutation hook to approve a pending verification request and invalidate the pending list and currentUserProfile caches on success.
Add a React Query mutation hook to reject a pending verification request and invalidate the pending list caches on success (and invalidate currentUserProfile if appropriate).
Ensure the hook compiles against updated bindings (ProfileRole now includes student; profile includes verificationStatus) and remains compatible with existing call sites after updating them.
